zh.Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales, United Kin: 英國威爾斯福林爾易費格
zh.Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士福林爾利納亞薩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Griffith於1529年出生在威爾士福林爾利納亞薩時，她的父親Thomas Griffith Fychan24歲，母親Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn24歲。她於1553年與Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi在威爾士福林爾弗林特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales, United Kin: 英国威尔斯福林爾易費格
zh-hans.Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士福林爾利納亞薩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Griffith于1529年出生在威尔士福林爾利納亞薩时，她的父亲Thomas Griffith Fychan24岁，母亲Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn24岁。她于1553年与Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi在威尔士福林爾弗林特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Griffith was born in 1529, in Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales, her father, Thomas Griffith Fychan, was 24 and her mother, Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn, was 24. She married Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi in 1553, in Flint, Flintshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1582, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales, United Kin: Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Griffith est née en 1529, à Llanasa, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Thomas Griffith Fychan, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi en 1553, à Flint, Flintshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1582, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Griffith 1529 in Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Griffith Fychan 24 und ihre Mutter Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn 24. Sie hat 1553 in Flint, Flintshire, Wales Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1582 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Griffithが1529年にウェールズフリントシュアイアラナサで生まれた時，父Thomas Griffith Fychanは24歳，母Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostynは24歳であった。1553年にウェールズフリントシュアイアフリントでHywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Griffith(이)가 1529년 웨일스 플린츠히르 랜아사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Griffith Fychan(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1553년 웨일스 플린츠히르 플린트에서 Hywel "Wynne" ab Edward ap Badi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
